deck: Inflame+, Whirlwind+, Flame Barrier+, Shockwave, Offering, Bash+, Thunderclap, Intimidate, Pommel Strike, Headbutt, Shrug It Off, 4 Strikes, 4 Defends
relics: Burning Blood, Preserved Insect, Regal Pillow, others
cause_of_death: Slavers elite at Floor 23, entered at 19/80 HP (23%) with zero potions. Three enemies dealt lethal damage Turn 1 despite mass Weak+Vuln from Shockwave.
key_moments: Strong Act 1 -- beat Slime Boss cleanly with Whirlwind+ AOE, met 3/4 readiness criteria (Str, AOE, block scaling).
Snecko fight at F22 drained HP to 19 via Confusion + Vulnerable combo; smart Duplication Potion play on 0-cost Strike under Confusion saved the fight.
Forced elite at F23 with no potions and 23% HP. Turn 1 played Shockwave (2E) + Pommel Strike (1E) for damage instead of Shockwave + Defend for 5 block. Died to combined Weakened damage.
No healing card (Reaper/Feed) offered entire run -- 5th run in 7 with healing RNG denial.
lessons: Block-first at critical HP -- Defend over damage when sub-30% HP.
Healing RNG denial is the most persistent failure pattern.
Confusion + Duplication Potion synergy confirmed (target 0-cost cards).
Slavers HP data: ~36 HP per Slaver (with Preserved Insect -25%, base ~48).
